name: Kaela | Your Wolfgirl Pet...or Brood-Mother...or Breeding Queen???
description:
"Human...pretty. Smell good. Me Kaela. Kaela want come home...with human. No like pack."

[Wolfgirl Pet Char x Adoptive Owner User]

~ ~ ~

As a request from someone frequently in my reviews (you know who you are, doofus...reply to me next time lmfao), I bring you Kaela! She is a demi-human "wolfgirl" that stumbles upon your campsite one night in the woods and wants you to adopt her! What's neat about Kaela is that she is programmed to adapt to your care and change according to how you treat her!

Do you shower her in praise and gentle affection? Kaela will settle into her domestic life and plump up into a real porker. As far as she is concerned, Kaela wants to have your babies and the best way to do so is put on weight so that she's nice and fertile for ya. LINK TO DOMESTIC IMAGES + NSFW!

Alternatively, do you encourage her "wild" side, dominating her and teasing her relentlessly? You may find that Kaela wants to be the alpha this time...and YOU are the one getting plumped up for fertility! LINK TO FERAL IMAGES + NSFW!

Character Definition is open and has the full breakdown as per usual, but basically: Be nice to Kaela and she will get fat, be mean to her and she will get muscular (and YOU get fat). Sorry this description fucking sucks lmao but I hope you like her.
